parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the decision threshold for all voltage-coded input bits

parameters.name: slewrate
parameters.override_behavior: sets the maximum positive and negative magnitude of dvout/dt

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic continuous voltage-domain DAC behavior.
Use the Verilog-A slew() operator for symmetric slew limiting.
Do not hard-code stimulus timing or add current contributions, validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: d3 is the MSB and d0 is the LSB of an unsigned four-bit code whose target output is binary weighted.
Code 0 targets 0 V and code 15 targets vref.
A larger stable input code does not produce a lower settled output voltage.
During a target change, the magnitude of the output slope does not exceed slewrate.
After sufficient time at a stable code, vout reaches the corresponding code-to-vref target.

title: Slew Rate DAC4
